meta.title: {siteName} — Cultural Festival 2026
meta.description: Cultural and music festival. Live concerts, gastronomy, and unique experiences.
meta.ogDescription: Cultural and music festival. Live concerts and unique experiences.

promo.label: Summer 2026 promo
promo.ctaDescription: Get access to exclusive festival promotions
promo.rgpdDescription: We are committed to protecting your privacy. Before continuing, we want you to know exactly how we handle your data:
promo.rgpdNoSell: We do not sell or share your data
promo.rgpdNoSellDesc: with external companies, advertisers, or third parties for commercial purposes.
promo.rgpdCookies: We only use technical and analytics cookies
promo.rgpdCookiesDesc: to improve your browsing experience. Marketing cookies (Facebook Pixel, Google Analytics) are only activated if you expressly accept them in the cookie banner.
promo.rgpdSecureDesc: on European servers (Supabase/Vercel EU) with encryption in transit and at rest.
promo.rgpdEmail: We will use your email and phone only
promo.rgpdEmailDesc: to send you the limited promotions for the festival.
promo.rgpdRights: withdraw your consent, access, rectify, or delete your data
promo.rgpdRightsSuffix: at any time by contacting us or exercising your GDPR rights.
promo.rgpdLegal: Legal basis: Art. 6.1.a GDPR (explicit consent). Controller: {siteName}.
promo.formSubtitle: Fill in your details and you will receive the promotions by email
promo.submitConsent: By submitting, you confirm that you have read and accepted our
promo.successDescription: You will receive the limited promotions for the festival in your email. Check your inbox.
promo.errorDescription: We could not process your request. Please try again.

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience.

footer.manifesto: A cultural cycle where the sun, the sea, and vacation time become an artistic experience.

about.description: For several days, the venue becomes a space where you can enjoy:

howItWorks.heading: How does the festival work?
howItWorks.villageDescription: Free access with limited capacity during the day. Market, gastronomy, digital art, and atmosphere.
howItWorks.arenaDescription: Main concerts take place in the Arena with official ticket access.

checkout.cancelMessage: Your purchase has been cancelled. No charges were made.
